items.name: Royal Blue Kanchipuram Silk Saree
items.description: A stunning royal blue Kanchipuram silk saree with rich pink and gold zari border. Intricate temple motifs woven throughout — perfect for weddings and grand celebrations.

items.name: Traditional Green & Pink Pattu Saree
items.description: Elegant green and pink pattu saree with golden zari work. A timeless combination that celebrates Indian heritage with every drape.

items.name: Coral Pink Kanchipuram Silk Saree
items.description: Radiant coral pink silk saree with a lustrous golden zari border. Light yet regal — ideal for temple visits, festivals, and family gatherings.

items.name: Silver Grey Cotton Silk Saree
items.description: Graceful silver grey cotton silk saree with soft pink zari border. Lightweight and breathable — perfect for daily elegance and office wear.

items.name: Golden Yellow Silk Saree
items.description: Vibrant golden yellow silk saree with a rich purple and gold contrast border. A bold statement piece that turns heads at any celebration.

items.name: Rose Pink Kanchipuram Silk Saree
items.description: Exquisite rose pink Kanchipuram silk saree with traditional gold zari weaving. A bridal favourite that radiates grace and grandeur.
